graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'DownloadedFileInfo'
| group NbFiles=count() by DownloadedFileUser
graphs.title: Downloaded Files with URL Metadata by User

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'DownloadedFileInfo'
| group NbFiles=count() by DownloadedFileHostDomain
graphs.title: Downloaded Files by Host Domain

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'DownloadedFileInfo'
| columns DownloadedFileUser, DownloadedFileName, DownloadedFileExtension, DownloadedFileHostDomain, DownloadedFileHostUrl, DownloadedFileReferrerDomain, DownloadedFileZoneId, DownloadedFileSize, DownloadedFileModified
| sort -DownloadedFileModified
graphs.title: All Downloaded Files with Zone.Identifier URLs

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'DownloadedFileInfo' DownloadedFileExtension in ('.exe', '.msi', '.dll', '.ps1', '.bat', '.cmd', '.vbs', '.js', '.jar', '.scr', '.hta')
| columns DownloadedFileUser, DownloadedFileName, DownloadedFileExtension, DownloadedFileHostDomain, DownloadedFileHostUrl, DownloadedFileReferrerUrl, DownloadedFilePath, DownloadedFileModified
| sort -DownloadedFileModified
graphs.title: Potentially Executable Downloads

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'DownloadedFileInfo' DownloadedFileHostDomain = ''
| columns DownloadedFileUser, DownloadedFileName, DownloadedFilePath, DownloadedFileReferrerUrl, DownloadedFileZoneId, DownloadedFileModified
| sort -DownloadedFileModified
graphs.title: Records Without Host Domain

graphs.query:
task.type = 'RemoteOps' artifact.type != 'stdout' RecordType = 'EndpointInfo'
| columns EndpointHostname, EndpointOS, EndpointOSVersion, EndpointOSBuild, EndpointCollectionDate
graphs.title: Endpoint Metadata

description: Inventory of download URLs extracted from Zone.Identifier ADS for files in user Downloads folders
